<snip>

> 
>>Description:
> 
>       
>       The old distfile of rxvt is no longer available.
>       I have upgrade the port to 2.6.PRE2 version. This version

<snip>
 
Actually the distfile is available, you just have to change the master site to
/pub/rxvt/old for mason and /pub/rxvt/devel for fu-berlin.
See ports/x11/rxvt/
